prose:
**Pyridine frontier-orbital analysis** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `.xyz` file, analyzed at fixed geometry (single-point, not re-optimized). SCF converged in 10 cycles. **HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.1398 eV** (Koopmans-style vertical orbital gap). HOMO energy: −7.2526 eV; LUMO energy: −1.1128 eV. Integrity status: ✓ trustworthy. Command: `cli frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 pyridine.xyz`. Koopmans descriptors also reported (vertical IP, EA, electronegativity, hardness, softness, electrophilicity index).</prose>
<parameter name="n_atoms">11
